brand.name: INVYTRA
loadingQuotes: Creating First Impressions That Last Forever.
Every Celebration Deserves a Grand Entrance.

about.heading: Redefining the Art of Invitation.
about.description1: We don't just design invitations; we craft immersive digital experiences. Each INVYTRA creation is a bespoke website that sets the perfect tone for your most cherished moments.
about.description2: From elegant typography to cinematic animations, every detail is meticulously refined to ensure your guests are captivated before the celebration even begins.

hero.headline: Luxury Digital Invitations That Leave a Lasting Impression
hero.subheading: Create unforgettable digital invitations for weddings, birthdays, engagements, baby showers, corporate events, and every special occasion.

features.title: Premium Design
features.description: Awwwards-quality designs that reflect your unique taste and style.

features.title: Custom Made
features.description: Fully personalized typography, colors, and layouts tailored to your event.

features.title: Interactive
features.description: Cinematic scroll animations, glassmorphism, and elegant hover effects.

features.title: Fast Delivery
features.description: Receive your completely customized, responsive invitation website within days.

process.title: Share
process.desc: Send your elegant link to guests.

templates.name: Emarald Reverie
templates.description: A majestic and timeless design featuring rich gold accents and classic serif typography. Perfect for grand, traditional weddings.

templates.name: True Royale
templates.description: Clean lines, generous whitespace, and subtle animations. For those who appreciate the beauty of simplicity.

templates.name: Velour Vows
templates.description: Delicate watercolor florals and soft pastel tones create a warm, welcoming atmosphere.

testimonials.name: Sarah & James
testimonials.text: INVYTRA absolutely transformed how we invited our guests. Everyone asked who designed our website. It was stunning.

testimonials.name: Elena M.
testimonials.text: The animations were incredibly smooth. It felt like scrolling through an expensive brand's website. Worth every penny.

testimonials.name: Marcus T.
testimonials.text: Professional, seamless, and visually breathtaking. INVYTRA delivered exactly what our corporate brand needed.
